characters.description: Uru's young Worker champion. After Sift is struck by three poisoned bolts, Ruwen uses his magical supplies and works with Hamma to keep their companion alive.
characters.name: Ruwen Starfield

characters.description: An Order healer traveling with Ruwen. She applies steady medical judgment and maintains an efficient healing spell while treating Sift's poisoned wounds.
characters.name: Hamma

characters.description: Ruwen's badly wounded companion. He survives three poisoned crossbow hits, although the condition shown by his public profile does not match his actual state.
characters.name: Sift

characters.description: The Worker leader organizing the expedition. She accepts Ruwen's apology after the ambush, treats him as a prospective member of her group, and assigns Bliz to prepare him for the journey.
characters.name: Big D

characters.description: The Order enforcement officer who leads the response to the poisoned crossbow ambush. He takes Hamma's account, circulates a description of the attackers, and escorts Ruwen's injured group to the Workers' Lodge while the case remains unresolved.
characters.name: Officer Caleb

characters.description: The Worker Big D assigns to prepare Ruwen for the expedition.
characters.name: Bliz

characters.description: An unseen figure whom Ruwen recognizes as the director of the poisoned-crossbow ambush. His identification of Slib's mother remains a private suspicion without proof.
characters.name: Slib's mother

characters.description: One of two large Workers assigned to protect Ruwen during the expedition. He shares the bodyguard duty with Quip during the outing.
characters.name: Whip

characters.description: A Worker bodyguard paired with Whip for Ruwen's protection. His assignment places him beside Ruwen and the other companions during the dangerous outing.
characters.name: Quip

characters.description: A Worker handler and crew lead at Deepwell's main warehouse. Avi directs the team that precisely loads expedition supplies into Ruwen's Voidband.
characters.name: Avi

characters.description: Hamma's mother, a high-level Merchant and Deepwell councillor. She addresses the departing expedition and stands as Big D's political counterpart.
characters.name: Hamma's mother

characters.description: A powerful fighter attached to Slib's household. Ruwen recognizes his distinctive black crossbow as matching the weapon connected to the earlier ambush, though that does not prove his involvement.
characters.name: House Captain Juva

characters.description: The Black Pyramid's mistress and a Shadowstrider with authority over access to the sentient dungeon. She investigates hostile divine agents and grants protected entry to Ruwen's companions.
characters.name: Kai

characters.description: An ally with protected access to the Black Pyramid. He remains near the expedition camp while Kai investigates possible agents of a hostile deity.
characters.name: Tremine

characters.description: An unseen possible agent serving Naktos and associated with dangerous soul magic. Kai investigates the threat while warning that the apparent motive may be misleading.
characters.name: Naktos mage

characters.description: The sentient Black Pyramid, able to aid residents only within its governing rules. When Hamma helps repair Uru's chapel, Blapy permits the restoration and receives her as a new marked visitor.
characters.name: Blapy

characters.description: The Black Pyramid quartermaster who starts Ruwen on a repeatable cleaning quest.
characters.name: Quartermaster Fluffy

characters.description: A hostile young Mage from Ruwen's past. His household is connected to Ruwen's private suspicion about the crossbow ambush, but the accusation remains unproved.
characters.name: Slib Strongspell

characters.description: Ruwen's patron and Deepwell's protector deity.
characters.name: Uru

characters.description: Uru's hostile brother and divine rival.
characters.name: Naktos

characters.description: An adviser constrained by rules that prevent direct intervention in mortal danger. During Ruwen's fight with a concealed assassin, her limited comments point him toward a possible use of his Voidband.
characters.name: Rami

characters.description: A legendary sentient talisman awarded when Ruwen becomes Inkwarden. Once soul-bound behind his ear, she can inspect his memories and offers to help investigate his missing parents.
characters.name: Bookworm

characters.description: Sift's former partner, returned as a shade without memories of him. Sift recognizes her immediately, but she does not recognize their relationship, creating a painful break between past and present.
characters.name: The shade

characters.description: A concealed operative serving Naktos and the same attacker who targeted Ruwen on his Ascension Day. The shade meets him away from camp, leaving her purpose and allegiance uncertain.
characters.name: Naktos assassin

characters.description: The tiny crystal intelligence governing the camp dungeon. It survived Ruwen's destructive harvesting and asks him for power, protection, and a pledge before considering reconciliation.
characters.name: crystal dungeon keeper

characters.description: The name Ruwen gives the crystal dungeon keeper after restoring its power and accepting a soul oath as master of its damaged dungeon.
characters.name: Fractal

characters.description: A sentient dagger known to Ruwen and his companions.
characters.name: Io
